scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp -f *.html *.js public/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -R assets public/assets 2>/dev/null || true && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='public/generate.html';if(fs.existsSync(p)){let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!s.includes('mode-patch.js')){s=s.replace('</body>','<script src=\"./mode-patch.js?v=2\"></script></body>');fs.writeFileSync(p,s)}}" && echo "Static files copied to public"
